meaning: n.飞机或太空飞船的越过定点,飞越
examples: The craft does not have enough fuel on board to do another flyby.
On October 5, 2008 4:40 am EDT, MESSENGER successfully completed its second flyby of Mercury.
The process of manufacturing MBR-2 from the moment of laying before the flyby took 3.5 months.
The manoeuvre will put the probe on a path to flyby Earth in October next year.
Thatcher requested that she not lie in state and that there be no military flyby.
